scenarios.title: Knowledge synthesis E2E uses deterministic stack-owned input

gherkin.given: the disposable live stack is healthy
gherkin.when: the knowledge synthesis E2E captures deterministic article content
gherkin.then: capture and synthesis complete through real services and stats reflect the processing outcome

scenarios.title: Knowledge synthesis regression fails on non-owned external URL dependency

gherkin.given: a required E2E fixture points at a non-owned external URL
gherkin.when: the test requires that remote extraction for success
gherkin.then: the regression fails and routes the fixture back to deterministic stack-owned input
